name: telegram-bot
description: Bridge Telegram messages to Gemini CLI for remote coding agent access

settings.name: Allowed User IDs
settings.description: Comma-separated Telegram user IDs allowed to interact (leave empty to allow all)

settings.name: Working Directory
settings.description: Directory where Gemini CLI operates when invoked from Telegram

settings.name: Approval Mode
settings.description: Tool approval mode: default, auto_edit, or yolo
